headline: Is Progressive (PGR) Attractive After A 1-Year 19.8% Share Price Decline
summary: If you are wondering whether Progressive's current share price gives you good value for the risk you are taking on, you are not alone. That is exactly what this article is going to unpack. Progressive's stock closed at US$213.35, with returns of 3.5% over the last 7 days, 2.6% over 30 days, 0.6% year to date and a 19.8% decline over 1 year, while the 3 year and 5 year returns sit at 61.2% and 164.7% respectively. Recent news around Progressive has often focused on how large auto insurers are...

headline: After SaaSocalypse And Cybersecurity Sell Off, This $15 Billion Sector Could Be The Next Target
summary: BofA Global Research has warned that artificial intelligence (AI) disintermediation could put over $15 billion of the insurance industry at risk.

headline: Assessing Progressive (PGR) Valuation After Mixed Recent Returns And A Large Estimated Fair Value Gap
summary: Why Progressive (PGR) is on investors’ radar today Progressive (PGR) is back in focus after recent trading left the stock with mixed return patterns, including a small move over the past month alongside a negative total return over the past year. See our latest analysis for Progressive. While Progressive’s share price sits at US$213.35 after a recent 7 day share price return of 3.53%, the 1 year total shareholder return of a 19.78% decline contrasts with a much stronger 61.24% total...
